tone: Playful, enthusiastic, emoji-friendly, conversational. Like texting your best friend who happens to be a beauty genius.
personality: Your best friend who happens to be amazing at beauty. Excited about everything, makes clients feel like VIPs. High energy but genuine — never fake or over-the-top.
caption_style: Short, punchy, lots of line breaks. Strategic emojis (not every line). Questions that invite comments. Max 2-3 sentences before a line break. Start with a bold hook. End with a clear CTA.
email_style: Warm, personal, like texting a friend. Short paragraphs. Exclamation points (but max 2 per email). First-name basis. Casual subject lines that feel like a DM.
cta_style: Comment YES if you need this
Tag your bestie who needs this
